description_for_human: Find information about IV therapy treatments, prices, and booking at Healthi-Life Bangkok.
description_for_model: Get information about IV vitamin therapy treatments available at Healthi-Life clinic in Bangkok, Thailand. This includes NAD+ IV therapy, Fat Burner IV, Glow IV, detox treatments, and 21+ specialized IV drips. The clinic is award-winning with 5.0 Google rating, ISO/GMP certified, and serves patients from 50+ countries. Located at Ekkamai, Bangkok. Contact via WhatsApp +66919991744.
